overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked Night City street at night. The scene features prominent red neon signage for 'Tyger Claws' gang, digital billboards, wet reflective asphalt, and transitions from an open commercial street into a narrow covered walkway beneath an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet neon-lit commercial street with digital advertising

events.description: futuristic vehicle passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a small group of pedestrians through the rain-soaked street

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: digital speed limit sign displaying '40' mounted on a pole
massive red neon sign with Japanese characters and 'TYGER CLAWS' text mounted on building facade
elevated highway or monorail track running parallel to the street
large vertical digital advertisement screen showing a woman's face

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked Night City street at night, with the camera following a character walking along the sidewalk. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the wet asphalt while a futuristic vehicle passes on the left. The massive Tyger Claws neon sign looms ahead in the distance, and an overpass structure runs along the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: street beneath massive gang signage and towering buildings

events.description: passing directly beneath the massive Tyger Claws neon sign as the street narrows
dominant red neon light from Tyger Claws sign intensifies and reflects off wet surfaces

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street passing under the glowing red signage, moving closer to the overpass

entered.detail: digital screen displaying food advertisement with green text

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath the massive red Tyger Claws neon sign that dominates the left side of the street, casting intense red reflections on the wet pavement. The street gradually narrows as the overpass structure looms closer on the right. Digital billboards continue to line the street while the speed limit sign disappears from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath the overpass with walls closing in on both sides
passing a vendor stall with magazines displayed and a bystander leaning on the railing

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow covered passage passing a street vendor and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt leaning against the railing looking out at the street

entered.detail: green concrete wall covered in red and white graffiti tags
wooden rack displaying magazines or postcards on the sidewalk
large illuminated advertising screen showing a woman's face with pink background

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, covered walkway beneath the overpass where the sky is no longer visible. The right wall is covered in colorful graffiti, and a vendor stall with magazines appears on the left. The lighting shifts from vibrant neon to more subdued artificial light as the character passes a bystander in a green shirt and continues through the enclosed passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban corridor that transitions from an open neon-lit street into a claustrophobic covered walkway. It begins on a slick sidewalk where digital billboards and a passing futuristic vehicle illuminate the wet asphalt, with a massive Tyger Claws sign looming in the distance. As the character advances, the camera moves directly beneath the towering red neon sign, which casts intense crimson reflections across the pavement while the street narrows against the encroaching overpass. The scene then shifts into the enclosed passage beneath the structure, where the open sky vanishes and the vibrant neon gives way to subdued artificial light. Finally, the camera glides past a graffiti-covered wall and a magazine vendor, following the character past a bystander in a green shirt through the dim, sheltered walkway.
